title: helichrysum globiferum
intro: Helichrysum globiferum, also known as the Globe everlasting or Island everlasting, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Some of the health benefits associated with Helichrysum globiferum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum globiferum can be prepared as an essential oil, herbal tea, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
